title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Naukri Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
